name: aMuTorrent
description: Unified download manager for aMule, rTorrent, qBittorrent, Deluge and Transmission with a single modern web interface.

notes.text: Configure your download clients (aMule, rTorrent, qBittorrent, Deluge, Transmission) via the setup wizard at first login.
Apprise (push notifications) is installed via pip. LAN client connections are configured in the UI, not via Docker extra_hosts.
